tickets.name: Riding the Jet Stream
tickets.note: Pederson is squaring up rockets (59% hard-hit) and sends it skyward (21°), Sanchez is impacting the ball at an elite clip (53% hard-hit), and Henderson has real over-the-fence pop (51/100).

tickets.name: Upper Deck Bound
tickets.note: Pederson is making elite contact (59% hard-hit) and drives the ball into the air (21°), Ward tilts the bat for distance (20°), and Manzardo is hitting line drives (51% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Off the Scoreboard
tickets.note: Abreu gets a yard playing like a launchpad tonight and is punishing the baseball (53% hard-hit), Burger is stinging it on a rope (56% hard-hit), and Cowser packs respectable power (52/100 grade).

tickets.name: To the Heavens
tickets.note: Abreu plays in a wind tunnel pointed at the seats and is squaring up everything (53% hard-hit), Canzone is crushing the baseball (53% hard-hit), and Clemens carries premium thump (.242 ISO).

tickets.name: Liftoff Sequence
tickets.note: Montgomery has gusts carrying balls over the wall and is lighting up the radar gun (60% hard-hit), Olson is blistering line drives (62% hard-hit), and Young has the wind howling out behind him.

tickets.name: Second Stage
tickets.note: Montgomery has the jet stream pushing toward the seats and is leaving scorch marks (60% hard-hit), Baldwin is teeing off (58% hard-hit), and Melendez swings with the wind at his back.

tickets.name: Heaping Plate
tickets.note: Hoskins is mashing the ball (54% hard-hit) and swings with home-run loft (22°), Alonso is hitting frozen ropes (58% hard-hit), Langford stays in the launch zone (21°), and Okamoto gets a park that's launching everything tonight.

tickets.name: Midnight Special
tickets.note: Nick Kurtz is scorching the ball (66% hard-hit), swings a .261-ISO sledgehammer, finds the home-run trajectory (18°), and gets a touch of carry tonight.

tickets.name: Midday Meal
tickets.note: Kazuma Okamoto has the jet stream pushing toward the seats, is barreling balls at will (58% hard-hit), has loft to spare (20°), and swings a heavy stick (88/100 power).

tickets.name: Quick Buck
tickets.note: Rafael Devers is hammering the ball (61% hard-hit), gets ideal loft (20°), plays in a slightly friendly yard, and swings one of the biggest sticks on the board (93/100 power).

tickets.name: In the Black
tickets.note: Matt Chapman is making thunderous contact (55% hard-hit), lives in the launch window (22°), has the yard tilting his way, and packs a big-league power grade (77/100).

tickets.name: The Float
tickets.note: Casey Schmitt hits it on the perfect plane (21°), carries .226 of real ISO, catches a small park boost, and is hitting it hard enough (48% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Walking-Around Money
tickets.note: Austin Riley is putting a charge into everything (57% hard-hit), launches it at the right angle (19°), and gets a sliver of help from the park.

tickets.name: The Cookie Jar
tickets.note: Willy Adames keeps the ball in the air (20°), carries solid slug (.205 ISO), plays in a slightly friendly yard, and is making quality contact (48% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Pocket Money
tickets.note: Kyle Higashioka has a swing built for the seats (19°), is making loud contact (51% hard-hit), carries a solid power grade (65/100), and he's squaring more up lately.

tickets.name: The Allowance
tickets.note: Brandon Nimmo is denting outfield walls (55% hard-hit), stays in the sweet-spot angle (18°), brings average-plus thump (52/100), and the model still lands him at 72.

tickets.name: Cashing Out
tickets.note: Bryce Eldridge is hitting absolute lasers (64% hard-hit), swings with natural lift (18°), catches a small park boost, and packs respectable power (65/100 grade).

tickets.name: The Slow Grind
tickets.note: Tyler Soderstrom swings with pop (.227 ISO), gets a touch of carry tonight, is driving balls into the gaps (52% hard-hit), and brings fringe-average pop (44/100).

tickets.name: Steady Drip
tickets.note: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. has gusts carrying balls over the wall, is generating elite exit velo (57% hard-hit), and gets there more on timing than thump (39/100 power).

tickets.name: Singles Add Up
tickets.note: Mitch Garver puts air under the ball (22°), is squaring up its share (50% hard-hit), has the pop to go deep (80/100 power), and our projection sits at 77.

tickets.name: Chip Stack
tickets.note: Yohendrick Pinango plays in a wind tunnel pointed at the seats, is hitting bullets (54% hard-hit), has textbook lift (17°), and swings with usable power (55/100).

tickets.name: The Vig Killer
tickets.note: Brandon Valenzuela has gusts carrying balls over the wall, has the swing plane dialed for liftoff (21°), and has enough pop to clear it (64/100 power).

tickets.name: Direct Deposit
tickets.note: Mike Yastrzemski is lifting everything (22°), has the yard tilting his way, is stinging the ball (50% hard-hit), and brings average-plus thump (66/100).
